title: リッキーの押しかけ☆お悩み相談室

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
La laa laa! ♪ Guess I'd better start getting ready
for training!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Ah, w-wait! I'm only worried about you!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I ended up losing my cool again... But I just...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Seems like you're having some trouble. If you
don't mind, I'd like to hear about it. I might be
able to help. ☆

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
...And so, I've been getting annoyed at my weak
performance. I know she's concerned about me,
but she's also my rival, so it's pretty frustrating.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I see! So... I know this might seem unrelated, but
what color are your dorm room bed and pajamas?
They wouldn't happen to be red, would they?

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Yeah, they are. How did you know that?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In feng shui, red is a color which raises your
chances of winning in competitions. However, it
can also exacerbate your emotional ups and
downs.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's why having the color red for your bed,
which is supposed to be a place of peace, can
lead to overstimulation and irritation.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What you need are some houseplants! Plants with
round leaves can help soothe your heart, and
even help improve your relationships!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: But that's just the start. As for your bedding—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey gets so caught up helping that she
completely forgets about training.
